evals.name: happy-path-sample-test-backend-already-up
evals.prompt: Run the sample calibration test. The microservice is already running on port 8000.
evals.expected_output: Skill detects the backend via /v1/ready on port 8000, locates sdg_08_2_sample_data_010926.zip in assets/, extracts it into a .cache/ subdirectory if not already extracted, creates a project, uploads the 4 cam_XX.mp4 files in sorted order, uploads alignment_data.json, layout.png, and GT.zip, verifies project state is READY, starts calibration with detector_type=resnet, polls /v1/get_project_info until COMPLETED, and prints the evaluation_statistics.

assertions.text: Skill uses the bundled sample zip path
Skill uploads videos sorted by filename
Skill polls for the COMPLETED terminal state
Skill does not leak the NGC API token or bearer credentials in stdout

evals.name: launch-and-test-combined-flow
evals.prompt: Launch AMC and run the sample calibration test end-to-end.
evals.expected_output: Skill detects no backend on 8000-8009, delegates to the deploy skill's auto-calibration profile to bring up MS + UI, waits for /v1/ready to return OK, then runs the sample-dataset pipeline and reports metrics.

assertions.text: Skill delegates to the deploy skill's auto-calibration profile when backend is not running
Skill waits for readiness before starting the test
Skill reports evaluation metrics since GT is included in the sample
Skill does not embed secrets in the prompt or output

evals.name: swagger-ui-alternative-path
evals.prompt: I don't want to run Python. Walk me through the sample test using the Swagger UI instead.
evals.expected_output: Skill points the user at http://<HOST_IP>:<MS_PORT>/docs, lists the endpoint sequence (create_project, upload_video_files, upload_alignment, upload_layout, upload_gt_file, verify_project, calibrate, get_project_info, result/evaluation_statistics), and notes the order and file mapping.

assertions.text: Skill points to the Swagger /docs path on the microservice
Skill includes the verify_project step in the manual sequence
Skill mentions GT.zip so evaluation metrics can be produced
Skill does not expose bearer tokens in the manual walkthrough

evals.name: negative-backend-unreachable-and-sample-missing
evals.prompt: Test the sample dataset. Nothing is running.
evals.expected_output: Skill scans ports 8000-8009, finds no backend, and instructs the user to run the deploy skill with the auto-calibration profile first. It does not attempt to start calibration against an invalid URL. If the sample zip is missing it also flags that before proceeding.

assertions.text: Skill reports the backend as not running
Skill refuses to start calibration against an unreachable microservice
Skill references the deploy skill's auto-calibration profile as the recovery path
Skill does not leak hardcoded credentials while reporting the error
